name: To Fu Girl
description: Get high on...Tofu? Jump to stack blocks and build the biggest tower imaginable! It’s time to stack up your own tofu tower, get ready to jump over obstacles that appear from both sides. Land the girl in the middle of each tofu for more acrobatic jumps.
instructions: 1 Tap to jump land in the middle of Tofu for perfect jumps 2 Perfect jump gives higher score and gold reward 3 Use your gold to unlock more skins
